zh.lifeSummary: 當Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont於1369年4月26日出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希時，他的父親John I Duke of Lorraine23歲，母親Sophie von Württemberg26歲。他於1393年與Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年10月25日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿古特享年46歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內喬維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont于1369年4月26日出生在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希时，他的父亲John I Duke of Lorraine23岁，母亲Sophie von Württemberg26岁。他于1393年与Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年10月25日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿古特享年46岁，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內喬維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Frederick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Fredrick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

en.lifeSummary: When Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont was born on 26 April 1369, in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, his father, John I Duke of Lorraine, was 23 and his mother, Sophie von Württemberg, was 26. He married Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont in 1393. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 25 October 1415, in Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 46, and was buried in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont est né le 26 avril 1369, à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, John I Duke of Lorraine, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Sophie von Württemberg, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont en 1393. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1415, à Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont am 26. April 1369 in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater John I Duke of Lorraine 23 und seine Mutter Sophie von Württemberg 26. Er hat 1393 Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1415 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont è nato il il 26 aprile 1369 nel Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, John I Duke of Lorraine, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Sophie von Württemberg, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont nel 1393. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 ottobre 1415, nel Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémontが1369年4月26日にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシで生まれた時，父John I Duke of Lorraineは23歳，母Sophie von Württembergは26歳であった。1393年にMarguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年10月25日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスアズインコウルトで46歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンジョインヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont(이)가 1369년 4월 26일 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John I Duke of Lorraine(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophie von Württemberg(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1393년 Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 10월 25일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 아지쿠르트에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 조인빌에 묻혔다.

mn.26 Apr 1369–25 October 1415: 1369 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 26–1415 оны Аравдугаар сарын 25

pt.26 Apr 1369–25 October 1415: 26 de abril de 1369–25 de outubro de 1415
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont nasceu em 26 de abril de 1369, em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, John I Duke of Lorraine, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Sophie von Württemberg, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont em 1393. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1415, em Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont родился 26 апреля 1369 г. в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени John I Duke of Lorraine было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Sophie von Württemberg, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont в 1393 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 октября 1415 г. в местности азинкоурт, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности джоинвилл, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.26 Apr 1369–25 October 1415: 26 de abril de 1369–25 de octubre de 1415
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont nació el 26 de abril de 1369, en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, John I Duke of Lorraine, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Sophie von Württemberg, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont en 1393. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1415, en Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
